PowerShell(try { \(Get-Command ngrok -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "ngrok not found" }; try { \(Get-Command cloudflared -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "cloudflared not found" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://enjoyed-causes-border-toxic.trycloudflare.com/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $r.StatusCode; if \($r.Content -match 'FITME'\) { "OK: FITME 페이지 서빙됨" } else { "본문에 FITME 없음:"; $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $r.Content.Length\)\) })

PowerShell(git status; "===== log ====="; git log --oneline -5; "===== tags ====="; git tag)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $h = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -TimeoutSec 10; "health: $\($h | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; $body = @{ image = @{ base64 = "dGVzdA=="; width = 1080; height = 1440; mimeType = "image/jpeg"; rotation = 0 }; mode = "simple" } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/analyze" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -TimeoutSec 10; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell($wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $wc.Headers.Add\("Content-Type","application/json"\); $bytes = $wc.UploadData\("http://localhost:8000/analyze", "POST", [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\('{"image":{"base64":"dGVzdA==","width":1080,"height":1440,"mimeType":"image/jpeg","rotation":0},"mode":"precise"}'\)\); $json = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $json.Substring\($json.Length - 120\); "====="; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/analyze" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"mode":"simple"}' -TimeoutSec 10 } catch { "검증 에러 상태코드: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })
